data.title: AS Ekspress Grupp's digital subscriptions increased by 10% year-over-year in the Baltic States, totaling 244,500 in Q3 2025.
data.description: In the Baltic States, AS Ekspress Grupp saw a 10% growth in digital subscriptions compared to the previous year. This increase was consistent in the third quarter at 0% but reached 3% over the span of 9 months. By the end of September, the total number of digital subscriptions reached 244,500.

data.title: Community participation plays a key role in Tezos (XTZ) governance, ensuring smooth upgrades and blockchain progress.
data.description: The smooth progression and development of the Tezos blockchain heavily depend on active participation from the community. This involvement is crucial to ensure timely upgrades and prevent any disruptions, thus ensuring momentum in the platform's evolution. By engaging the community effectively, Tezos aims to maintain the efficiency and progress of its blockchain network.

data.title: GoldenPeaks Capital and Envision sign MoU to deliver 1 GWh of advanced Battery Energy Storage System projects in Europe.
data.description: In London, GoldenPeaks Capital (GPC), a prominent renewable power producer in Central and Eastern Europe, and Envision, a leading greentech company, have agreed to collaborate on providing and installing 1 GWh of advanced Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) projects throughout Europe. The Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed at a ceremony in London, with Daniel Tain, the co-founder and co-chairman of GoldenPeaks Capital in attendance.

data.title: Litecoin surges 10%, reaching $131, with trading volume at $1.66 billion. Ethereum dropped 1.87% while LTC awaits ETF approval.
data.description: Litecoin (LTC) surged by more than 10% on Thursday, outperforming major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) which experienced slight corrections of 0.52% and 1.87%, respectively. LTC hit $131, reaching its highest value in nearly eight months. Its trading volume spiked by 143% to $1.66 billion, marking it as one of the most traded tokens in the past 24 hours. The speculative market for LTC also saw significant activity, with futures open interest for the coin increasing by 25% to $1.21 billion, according to Coinglass. This surge in LTC's performance overshadowed the broader cryptocurrency pullback and indicated strong investor interest in the coin.

data.title: Durapower Group and Kıvanç Enerji sign MoU for battery manufacturing and renewable energy collab in US. Oct. 10, 2025.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Durapower Group, a prominent Singaporean company specializing in advanced lithium-ion batteries, announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding with Kıvanç Enerji, a Turkish industrial group, on October 8, 2025, in Detroit, United States. This agreement signals a promising collaboration between the two companies in the field of innovative battery solutions.

data.title: ADA consolidates around key levels, trading at $0.82, down 0.97% in 24hrs. It tests $0.75 support, with 20-day MA at $0.83.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ADA is currently trading at $0.82, experiencing a decrease of 0.97% within the last 24 hours. It is maintaining its position above the critical support level of $0.75, while encountering resistance from the 20-day moving average set at $0.83.

data.title: Shagang Group celebrates 50th anniversary at ceremony in China. Company leaders, employees, officials present.
data.description: In Zhangjiagang, China, on October 8, 2025, Jiangsu Shagang Group Co., Ltd. (Shagang) marked its 50th anniversary with a ceremony at the Shagang Gymnasium. The event was attended by company executives, retired staff, employee representatives, and officials from Zhangjiagang municipality.

data.title: XRP faces crucial support at $2.81 amid bearish trend below moving averages, signaling potential downside ahead.
data.description: The XRP cryptocurrency is currently being traded at a price of $2.81, facing a downward trend in the market. It is positioned beneath important moving averages and is testing crucial support levels that may impact its short-term trajectory.

data.title: BNB hovers around $1,273 with overbought RSI at 71.2, showing -0.72% decline. Strong momentum above moving averages.
data.description: The current trading price of Binance Coin is $1,273.02, reflecting a slight decrease of 0.72%. Technical analysis reveals an overbought Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 71.2. Despite this, the cryptocurrency continues to exhibit robust momentum, remaining consistently above key moving averages.

data.title: Salaries in crypto down despite Bitcoin's surge, highlighting industry shift to reduce costs and streamline pay structures.
data.description: Despite Bitcoin reaching record highs, salaries in the industry are actually decreasing. This change reflects a trend towards more efficient operations and a more organized approach to employee compensation.

data.title: Crypto bettors favor Venezuela's María Corina Machado over Trump for Nobel Peace Prize, with odds at 70% (from 3%), while $16 million already wagered.
data.description: Supporters of President Donald Trump are advocating for his Nobel Peace Prize win, however, cryptocurrency gamblers are placing their bets on Venezuelan politician María Corina Machado as the probable victor. The chances of Machado claiming the esteemed award spiked to 70% on Polymarket, marking a significant increase of 66 percentage points compared to the previous day. Conversely, the odds for Trump plummeted to a mere 3%. Meanwhile, Sudan's Emergency Response Rooms, recognized for their humanitarian efforts amid the country's enduring conflict, saw their likelihood of winning decrease to 15%. Over $16 million has already been staked on the result. The market will be settled as "Yes" following an official proclamation from the Norwegian Nobel Committee, anticipated to be announced early Friday morning. data.title: Winners of 2025 Gerald Loeb Awards announced in New York: James B. Stewart wins Lifetime Achievement Award, Lois Norder wins Minard Editor Award.
data.description: James B. Stewart, a journalist at The New York Times, was honored with the Lifetime Achievement Award, while Lois Norder from The Atlanta Journal-Constitution received the Minard Editor Award at the 2025 Gerald Loeb Awards ceremony at the Rainbow Room in New York on October 10. This prestigious event recognized outstanding journalism, with Stewart and Norder standing out among the winners. The award ceremony celebrated excellence in journalism and acknowledged the dedication and talent of these two individuals.
